texto: Once, [Rabbi Chanoch] Teller was traveling with 16 of his [18] offspring ... while changing planes in Frankfurt, Teller noticed a German woman gaping. 'Are all of these your children?' the woman asked. 'From one wife?' 'Yes, God has blessed me with all these children,' the rabbi replied. 'Haven't you heard about the population problem?'the woman sniffed. 'How many more children do you want to have?' Rabbi Teller paused and looked the woman in the eye: 'About 6 million,' he said.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Lynn Vincent que provoca temas ligados a motivacao. Ao questionar “Once, [Rabbi Chanoch] Teller was traveling with 16 of his [18] offspring ... while changing plane…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre motivacao, children, germany, com foco em viagem e inspiracao.
